case_title: YEE H. HSU VS. KARINA VANBOGART

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2009 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER BETSY JOHNSON FILED BY HSU, YEE H. VANBOGART, KARINA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-17-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VANBOGART, KARINA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-01-2009 BY DONALD SULLIVAN: APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. HEARD IN DEPT. 318.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT VANBOGART, KARINA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,600.00 FILED BY HSU, YEE H. AS TO DEFENDANT VANBOGART, KARINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HSU, YEE H. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VANBOGART, KARINA $4,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,505.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF PRINCIPAL AND COSTS PLUS POST-JUDGMENT INTEREST AT THE RATE OF 10% PER ANNUM ON BALANCE.THIS JUDGMENT RESULTS FROM A MOTOR VEHICLE ACCIDENT ON A CALIFORNIA HIGHWAY AND WAS CAUSED BY THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S OPERATION OF A MOTOR VEHICLE. IF THE JUDGMENT IS NOT PAID, YOU MAY APPLY TO HAVE THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S LICENSE SUSPENDED. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $250.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON JUN-01-2009 AND ON THE 1ST DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
